title: oreogrammitis beddomeana
intro: Oreogrammitis beddomeana, also known as the Beddome's Grammitid, is a species of fern in the family Grammitidaceae. This plant is native to the Western Ghats of India and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis beddomeana include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
